265: pub fn edit_pr_in_repo(
266:     pr_number: u64,
267:     title: Option<&str>,
268:     body: Option<&str>,
269:     repo: Option<&str>,
270: ) -> Result<()> {
271:     let number_str = pr_number.to_string();
272:     let mut args: Vec<&str> = vec!["pr", "edit", &number_str];
273:     if let Some(t) = title {
274:         args.extend_from_slice(&["--title", t]);
275:     }
276:     if let Some(b) = body {
277:         args.extend_from_slice(&["--body", b]);
278:     }
279:     if args.len() == 3 {
280:         anyhow::bail!("No edits specified — provide --title, --body, or --body-file");
281:     }
282:     let repo_arg: String;
283:     if let Some(r) = repo {
284:         repo_arg = r.to_string();
285:         args.push("--repo");
286:         args.push(&repo_arg);
287:     }
288:     run_gh(&args)?;
289:     Ok(())
290: }

305:         None
306:     }
